The Lord Sarfraz

In Parliament

  • Tweet

Here, you can see contributions by Lord Sarfraz in the House of Lords (provided by theyworkforyou):

Government Departments: ICT | Department for Science, Innovation and Technology | Written Answers

To ask His Majesty's Government what proportion of the 28 per cent of government legacy technology identified in the Government Cyber Action

Cybersecurity: Finance | Department for Science, Innovation and Technology | Written Answers

To ask His Majesty's Government what milestones have been met under the Government Cyber Action Plan, published on 6 January; and what propo

The UK Demographic Future - Motion to Take Note | Lords debates

My Lords, I too congratulate my noble friend on this report, on the debate and on a lifetime of public service.

Waste Disposal: Exports | Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs | Written Answers

To ask His Majesty's Government what assessment they have made of the humanitarian and environmental impacts of plastic waste exports o

Bangladesh: Rohingya | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Written Answers

To ask His Majesty's Government what assessment they have made of reports of sexual violence towards Rohingya women and girls in Cox's Bazaa

Artificial Intelligence: Economic Situation | Department for Science, Innovation and Technology | Written Answers

To ask His Majesty's Government what assessment they have made of the regional economic impact of generative artificial intelligence, partic

Cryptocurrencies: Regulation | Treasury | Written Answers

To ask His Majesty's Government what plans they have to regulate pound sterling-backed stablecoin; and what assessment they have made of the

Strategic Defence Review 2025 - Motion to Take Note | Lords debates

My Lords, I welcome the review—I read the whole document—and I congratulate the noble Lord, Lord Robertson.

Donald Trump | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Written Answers

To ask His Majesty's Government whether they would support the nomination of President Donald Trump for the Nobel Peace Prize in recognition
